'''鈭歵-zh-zh-f''' ('''katazhefoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:monomerise|monomerise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-zh-zh-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:monomerise|monomerise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵-zh-zh-f
|-
! Lemma
| katazhefoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitazhefoko|thitazhefoko]] || [[word:jitazhefoko|jitazhefoko]] || [[word:shitazhefoko|shitazhefoko]] || [[word:kitazhefoko|kitazhefoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutazhefoko|thuthutazhefoko]] || [[word:jujutazhefoko|jujutazhefoko]] || [[word:shushutazhefoko|shushutazhefoko]] || [[word:kukutazhefoko|kukutazhefoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thutazhefoko|thutazhefoko]] || [[word:jutazhefoko|jutazhefoko]] || [[word:shutazhefoko|shutazhefoko]] || [[word:kutazhefoko|kutazhefoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thutazhefoko|thutazhefoko]] || [[word:jutazhefoko|jutazhefoko]] || [[word:shutazhefoko|shutazhefoko]] || [[word:kutazhefoko|kutazhefoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thetazhefoko|thetazhefoko]] || [[word:jetazhefoko|jetazhefoko]] || [[word:shetazhefoko|shetazhefoko]] || [[word:ketazhefoko|ketazhefoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothotazhefoko|thothotazhefoko]] || [[word:jojotazhefoko|jojotazhefoko]] || [[word:shoshotazhefoko|shoshotazhefoko]] || [[word:kokotazhefoko|kokotazhefoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotazhefoko|thotazhefoko]] || [[word:jotazhefoko|jotazhefoko]] || [[word:shotazhefoko|shotazhefoko]] || [[word:kotazhefoko|kotazhefoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotazhefoko|thotazhefoko]] || [[word:jotazhefoko|jotazhefoko]] || [[word:shotazhefoko|shotazhefoko]] || [[word:kotazhefoko|kotazhefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙tazhefoko|th忙tazhefoko]] || [[word:j忙tazhefoko|j忙tazhefoko]] || [[word:sh忙tazhefoko|sh忙tazhefoko]] || [[word:k忙tazhefoko|k忙tazhefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathatazhefoko|thathatazhefoko]] || [[word:jajatazhefoko|jajatazhefoko]] || [[word:shashatazhefoko|shashatazhefoko]] || [[word:kakatazhefoko|kakatazhefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thatazhefoko|thatazhefoko]] || [[word:jatazhefoko|jatazhefoko]] || [[word:shatazhefoko|shatazhefoko]] || [[word:katazhefoko|katazhefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatazhefoko|thatazhefoko]] || [[word:jatazhefoko|jatazhefoko]] || [[word:shatazhefoko|shatazhefoko]] || [[word:katazhefoko|katazhefoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

|-
